official_ifs_requirements.requirement: UK registered academic institutions, RTOs or Catapults can apply for a share of up to GBP2.5m
The application must be submitted by the Knowledge Base partner; the Knowledge Base is the sole grant recipient
Each AKT is between a UK Knowledge Base lead and a UK registered business with four or more full time employees
Knowledge Base must be UK HE, FE, RTO or Catapult, invite the business, invite the AKT Monitoring Officer, and submit fEC or non-fEC evidence as applicable
Business partner must have four or more FTE, support finances, host the Associate, and provide supervisory support
Business Partner must commit at least 10 percent cash contribution; answers must not include hyperlinks

local_evidence_readback.finding: AKT6 is recorded as academic/RTO/Catapult lead and four-FTE gated. Existing local note records one FTE, which is still below the official four-FTE threshold.
QUB and Ulster contacts exist as target contacts only. No local record confirms either organisation as AKT6 Knowledge Base lead.
Existing material is a general affiliation/collaboration outreach draft, not an AKT6 lead commitment, IFS invitation, fEC/non-fEC evidence, or partner finance evidence.
Latest official route refresh already classifies AKT6 as explicitly gated or ineligible from current evidence.
Partner targets are candidates only. The file does not convert QUB, Ulster, or any Knowledge Base into a confirmed lead.

drive_searches.result_summary: Returned Aureon Grant War Room files and an older exported spreadsheet. These are planning records, not a confirmed Knowledge Base lead or FTE evidence.
Returned operating logs and an academic validation sprint email pack. No AKT6 lead, invite, fEC/non-fEC evidence, or four-FTE evidence found.
Returned Aureon Grant War Room files only. No confirmed Ulster AKT6 lead or application invite evidence found.
Returned Future Leaders Fellowship, corporate/support documents, and unrelated files. No evidence confirming R&A currently has four or more full-time equivalent employees found.
Returned corporate/support documents. One Go Succeed diagnostic was inspected and records current FTE below the AKT6 threshold.
Returned mixed technical/planning files and War Room records. No confirmed HE/FE/RTO/Catapult lead commitment found.
Returned War Room files only. No evidence of an invite sent to the AKT Monitoring Officer found.

drive_files_inspected.title: Complete_with_Docusign_R_and_A_consulting_an.pdf
drive_files_inspected.finding: Go Succeed diagnostic dated 08/07/2026 records current staffing level as 0.00 FTE and future hiring potential of 2-3 engineers. This supports growth potential but does not satisfy the current four-FTE AKT6 business partner requirement.

route_action.reason: Official AKT6 rules require a Knowledge Base lead and current four-or-more-FTE business partner evidence. Current Aureon local and Drive evidence does not satisfy those gates.

next_actions: Do not submit AKT6 directly as R&A; the application must be led and submitted by an eligible Knowledge Base partner.
Only change this route to draft-ready if a UK HE/FE/RTO/Catapult confirms lead status and creates or accepts the IFS lead role.
Only complete the business partner side if current evidence confirms R&A has four or more full-time equivalent employees and can evidence the required contribution.

If the gates are later satisfied, have the Knowledge Base invite R&A and the AKT Monitoring Officer in IFS, attach fEC/non-fEC evidence, complete finances, and review/submit before 15 July 2026 at 11:00.
controls: No unsupported Knowledge Base lead claim made
No unsupported cash contribution, fEC, non-fEC, Monitoring Officer invite, or partner T&C claim made
No IFS portal mutation, external email, upload, partner invite, award terms acceptance, or final submission performed
